# Bundled Vendor Assets

The iOS wrapper bundles fixed copies of the browser libraries that the web app loads from CDN.
This avoids depending on CDN script/style loading inside the packaged Capacitor app.

## Leaflet

- Source: https://leafletjs.com/
- Version: 1.9.4
- License: BSD-2-Clause
- Files:
  - `leaflet/leaflet.css`
  - `leaflet/leaflet.js`
  - `leaflet/images/*`
  - `leaflet/LICENSE`

## Leaflet.markercluster

- Source: https://github.com/Leaflet/Leaflet.markercluster
- Version: 1.5.3
- License: MIT
- Files:
  - `leaflet.markercluster/MarkerCluster.css`
  - `leaflet.markercluster/MarkerCluster.Default.css`
  - `leaflet.markercluster/leaflet.markercluster.js`
  - `leaflet.markercluster/LICENSE`
